candidate_definitions.text: Interactive evaluation for Neovim (Clojure, Fennel, Scheme, Python, JavaScript, PHP, R, Lua, Rust and more!)

FROM ubuntu:24.04 RUN apt-get update RUN apt-get upgrade -y RUN apt-get install -y neovim # JavaScript/TypeScript dependencies # RUN apt-get install -y nodejs # RUN apt-get install -y npm # RUN npm install -g typescript # RUN npm install -g ts-node CMD nvim
